name: Ham and Potato Casserole
servings: serves 16 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 45-50 minutes
method: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish with butter or cooking spray.
In a medium mixing bowl, whisk together the flour and milk.
Place the hash browns in the prepared baking dish. Top with the ham and peas. Season with salt and pepper.
Pour in the milk mixture. Top with the cheddar cheese and mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until golden-brown in color.
